rationale: The participants are real estate agents working with both buyers and sellers in property transactions. The paper explicitly describes their work: communicating with clients via chat, recommending properties to buyers, negotiating prices for sellers, and managing listings. These are the core responsibilities of Real Estate Sales Agents (41-9022.00), whose work encompasses facilitating property transactions, advising clients, and managing property information. The AI copilot augments their entire workflow rather than a single narrow task, making the occupation-level mapping most appropriate.

alternates.onet_label: Providing Consultation and Advice to Others
